creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
When using newer sendmail from ports and amavisd-new, during compile of amavis-milter it compiles with milter header from base system, than during first run it hangs with error:
Aug  7 16:47:26 martin amavis-milter: amavis-milter: smfi_register: version mismatch application: 2 != milter: 16777216
Aug  7 16:47:26 martin kernel: Aug  7 16:47:26 martin amavis-milter: amavis-milter: smfi_register: version mismatch application: 2 != milter: 16777216

After compile by hand:
cd /usr/ports/security/amavisd-new/work/amavisd-new-2.5.2/helper-progs/
and doing:
gmake clean
./configure --with-milterinc=/usr/local/include/
gmake
cp amavis-milter /usr/local/sbin

all works well.
